## Summary

Describe the change and why it belongs in this repository.

## Type

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Domain model
- [ ] Data source or evidence boundary
- [ ] Script or tooling
- [ ] Repository structure
- [ ] Safety or governance

## Checks

- [ ] File location matches `docs/reference/domain-map.md`.
- [ ] Source claims are traceable or explicitly marked as uncertain.
- [ ] Medical, neural, memory, and organizational safety boundaries are preserved.
- [ ] Relevant `README.md` / `AGENTS.md` files are updated.
- [ ] `python3 tools/check_repository.py` passes.

## Notes

List unresolved questions or follow-up work.
